overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a spacesuit exploring a dimly lit industrial underground facility. The character walks through a storage room, opens an automated door, and proceeds down a narrow corridor with exposed infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage room with metal shelving and equipment

events.description: automatic metal door opens as character approaches the exit

agents.ego_description: character in spacesuit walks steadily toward the exit door at the far end of the storage room

entered.detail: tall metal rack with multiple shelves holding equipment
rough-hewn stone wall with industrial signage mounted on it
red illuminated exit sign above the doorway
warning sign reading CAUTION PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT REQUIRED
large metal barrel on a wheeled cart
wooden workbench with tools and equipment

segments.scene_description: The character stands in an industrial storage room with stone walls and metal shelving. The camera follows from behind as the character walks toward an exit door marked with a red exit sign and caution signage. At approximately 4.5 seconds, the automatic door opens to reveal a corridor beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with exposed pipes and electrical infrastructure

events.description: character passes through doorway from storage room into narrow corridor
lighting shifts to dimmer atmospheric tone with overhead industrial fixtures

agents.ego_description: character proceeds down the narrow corridor, passing electrical panels and exposed piping

entered.detail: large industrial pipes running along the left wall
wall-mounted electrical box with warning symbols
bundles of cables running along the ceiling and walls
fluorescent tube lights mounted on the ceiling
structural metal supports and door frames along the right side

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow industrial corridor with exposed pipes and electrical infrastructure lining the walls. The lighting becomes dimmer and more atmospheric. The character continues walking forward through the passage, moving away from the storage room and deeper into the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a structured industrial storage area into a dim, atmospheric utility corridor. It begins behind a character in a spacesuit as they navigate a room of stone walls and metal shelving, moving steadily toward an exit marked by red signage. As the automatic door slides open, the camera glides forward, transitioning from the open storage space into a narrow passage. The scene then shifts into a more oppressive environment where exposed pipes and electrical infrastructure line the walls and the lighting grows dimmer. The camera continues to track the character as they move deeper into the facility, leaving the storage room behind for the depths of the industrial corridor.
